channel.title: Marriott on Bali Kini
channel.description: Recent content in Marriott on Bali Kini

item.title: Perusahaan AS Perkuat Investasi di Bali: Marriott hingga PepsiCo
item.description:
Sejumlah perusahaan besar asal Amerika Serikat secara resmi menegaskan komitmen mereka untuk memperluas dan menambah investasi di Bali. Hal ini disampaikan dalam acara Executive Briefing bertajuk “Impact of Innovation on Bali’s Economic Development: A Showcase of U.S. Companies’ Initiatives” yang digelar di Bali pada Kamis, 4 Juni 2026.

Acara tersebut diinisiasi oleh US-ASEAN Business Council (USABC), yang menyoroti berbagai inisiatif perusahaan-perusahaan Amerika dalam memperkuat fondasi pembangunan ekonomi Bali di tengah ketidakpastian ekonomi global.

item.title: US Companies Deepen Investment in Bali: Marriott to PepsiCo
item.description:
Several major US corporations have officially reaffirmed their commitment to expand and deepen their investments in Bali. The announcements came at an Executive Briefing titled “Impact of Innovation on Bali’s Economic Development: A Showcase of U.S. Companies’ Initiatives”, held in Bali on Thursday, June 4, 2026.

The event was organized by the US-ASEAN Business Council (USABC), which spotlighted the various initiatives of American companies contributing to Bali’s economic development amid global economic uncertainty.
